layouts.name: Landing Page
layouts.description: Designed to drive action. Ideal for campaigns, product launches, or single-product businesses.
layouts.code:
---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome to our landing page"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero 
  heading="Grow Your Business Faster" 
  subheading="We build highly optimized, secure, and beautiful websites tailored for local businesses." 
  badge="Introducing MYSITEBOT"
  align="center"
  actions={[
    { label: "Get Started", href: "/#contact", variant: "primary" },
    { label: "Learn More", href: "/#features", variant: "secondary" }
  ]}
/>

<Features 
  heading="Why Choose Us" 
  subheading="We deliver top-tier static sites with modern design and blazing fast performance."
  features={[
    { title: "Blazing Fast", description: "Fully static pages load in milliseconds.", icon: "zap" },
    { title: "SEO Optimized", description: "Built with search engines in mind from day one.", icon: "search" },
    { title: "Modern Design", description: "Stunning layouts that wow your visitors.", icon: "layout" }
  ]}
/>

<Testimonials 
  heading="What Our Clients Say"
  testimonials={[
    { quote: "This website completely transformed our business representation online!", author: "Sarah Jenkins", role: "Founder, Bloom Floral", avatar: "/static/sam.webp" },
    { quote: "Fast load times and a premium look. Very happy with the result.", author: "Marcus Vance", role: "CEO, Vance Tech", avatar: "/static/sam.webp" }
  ]}
/>

<ContactForm 
  heading="Get In Touch" 
  subheading="Ready to start? Send us a message and we will get back to you shortly."
  email="hello@example.com"
  fields={[
    { label: "Your Name", type: "text", required: true },
    { label: "Your Email", type: "email", required: true },
    { label: "Message", type: "textarea", required: true }
  ]}
/>
layouts.details: The Landing Page layout is optimized for conversion and page load speeds. It comes ready with a Hero header, feature highlights, customer testimonials, and a lead capture form.

We prepare all our food and drinks fresh with local, organic ingredients.

# content/pages/posts/first-post.mdx
---
title: "The Speed of Static Sites"
description: "Why static HTML beats heavy dynamic applications for content presentation"
pageLayout: "default"
---
# The Speed of Static Sites

When it comes to delivering content, speed is everything. Slow pages lead to high bounce rates and lower conversions.

## Why Static is Faster
- **No Database Overhead**: Traditional sites query a database for every page request. Static sites are compiled once and served directly as raw HTML/CSS.
- **Global CDN Delivery**: Static files can be cached and distributed globally to the edge, close to your users.
- **Improved Security**: Without an active database or server-side scripting runtime, the attack surface is virtually zero.

That's why we build MYSITEBOT with **Astro**—a modern static site builder designed for content-focused sites.

# content/pages/posts/welcome.mdx
---
title: "Welcome to Our Blog"
description: "Why we started this blog and what to expect"
pageLayout: "default"
---
# Welcome to Our Blog!

Welcome! We are incredibly excited to launch this new publication space. 

## What We'll Write About
Our focus is on three key areas:
1. **Design Systems**: Crafting reusable layout interfaces that make building sites faster.
2. **AI-driven Automation**: How LLMs and autonomous agents are shaping coding workflows.
3. **Static Sites**: Performance benefits of compiling content statically.

Thank you for reading, and make sure to subscribe on our homepage to never miss an update!

components.details: The Hero component is the crown jewel of our atomic library. It features ultra-bold typography, responsive layout switching (center vs left), and intelligent badge placement. It's designed to reduce bounce rates and guide users immediately toward your primary call to action.

uiComponents.name: Button
uiComponents.description: A dynamic element that renders an anchor link when href is present, otherwise a standard HTML button.
uiComponents.details: The Button component handles action states, styles, and transitions. It can be primary or secondary.

uiComponents.name: Input
uiComponents.description: A wrapper around the standard HTML <input> tag, styled with premium focus animations.
uiComponents.details: Standardized text input element that fits cleanly into any form layout.

uiComponents.name: Textarea
uiComponents.description: A wrapper around the standard HTML <textarea> tag, designed for multiline message boxes.
uiComponents.details: Pre-styled multi-line input field supporting custom row heights.
